# With no $BREEZE_DIR and not inside a git repo, breeze must error out rather than
# silently falling back to a shared machine-wide directory (a real incident: this
# used to default to ~/.breeze, causing split-brain between agents in different
# repos that each assumed they had their own daemon).
! exec breeze ping
stderr 'not recognized as inside a git repo'
stderr '\$BREEZE_DIR is not set'
